start.title: Welcome to Homarr
start.subtitle: Let's get started with setting up your Homarr instance.
start.description: To get started, please select how you want to set up your Homarr instance.

action.restoreSqliteDescription: Upload a full SQLite database backup from a previous Homarr instance. This will restore all boards, users, apps, integrations, and settings.

import.title: Import data
import.subtitle: You can import data from an existing Homarr instance.

dropzone.title: Drag the zip file here or click to browse
dropzone.description: The uploaded zip will be processed and you'll be able to select what you want to import

boardSelection.title: Found {count} boards
boardSelection.description: Choose all boards with the size you want to import

summary.title: Import summary
summary.description: In the below summary you can see what will be imported

token.label: Token
token.description: Enter the shown import token from your previous homarr instance

error.title: Invalid token
error.message: The token you entered is invalid

user.title: Admin user
user.subtitle: Specify the credentials for your administrator user.

group.title: External group
group.subtitle: Specify the group that should be used for external users.

name.label: Group name
name.description: Name has to match admin group of external provider

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Select the services you use.
integrations.description: Choose the integrations you'd like to connect. We'll set up your dashboard with matching widgets automatically.

error.title: Setup failed
error.message: Something went wrong while setting up your dashboard. Please try again.

helpers.description: These helpers try to guess the URL for your services. If it doesn't work, just type the address manually.

urlTemplate.label: Base URL
urlTemplate.hint: Enter your base domain or IP to auto-fill integration URLs
urlTemplate.warning: Setting your base URL now will auto-fill all integration URLs, saving you time during setup

docker.summary: Homarr detected {apps} apps, {integrations} of which have integrations built-in
docker.appSectionLabel: Apps to add to dashboard ({count} selected)
docker.scanningDescription: Looking for running containers on your system

finish.title: Finish setup
finish.subtitle: You are ready to go!
finish.description: You have successfully completed the setup process. You can now start using Homarr. Select your next action:

login.subtitle: Welcome back! Please enter your credentials

openSearchInNewTab.label: Open search results in new tab

action.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

field.name: Name
field.jsonPathHint: Use JSONPath syntax to extract values, e.g. $.data.temperature or $.items[0].name
field.label: Label
field.tablePathHint: Path to the array in the response, e.g. $.data.items
field.confirmTextHint: If set, a confirmation dialog will appear before executing the request

template.label: JSX Template
template.description: Mantine JSX template. Access API response fields via data bindings (e.g. data.name). Use whitelisted components only. Forbidden: constructor, __proto__, eval, Function, window, document.

displayTypeDescription.singleValue: Show one extracted value with a label and unit
displayTypeDescription.keyValue: Show multiple labeled values side by side
displayTypeDescription.table: Show rows of data in a table format
displayTypeDescription.statGrid: Colored stat cards in a grid — like Pi-Hole or Speedtest widgets
displayTypeDescription.progressBars: Progress bars showing usage or completion — for disk, memory, quotas
displayTypeDescription.statusIndicator: Colored status dots showing online/offline or health states
displayTypeDescription.countGrid: Compact number + label counters in a tight grid
displayTypeDescription.actionButton: A button that triggers a request when clicked
displayTypeDescription.customJsx: Custom JSX layout using whitelisted Mantine components with full API data binding

preview.title: Preview
preview.hint: Click Test to preview the API response with your current configuration.

notification.aiPromptDescription: Copy a pre-built prompt to paste into any AI chatbot (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini...). It includes the full widget schema and your API response so the AI can generate a ready-to-import JSON config for you.
notification.aiPromptNoResponse: Tip: Run a test first to include your API response in the prompt for better results.
notification.aiPromptCopyError: Failed to copy prompt to clipboard. Your browser may not support this feature.
notification.createError: Failed to create widget. Check your API endpoint is reachable.
notification.updateError: Failed to update widget. Your changes were not saved.
notification.importError: Failed to import widget. Ensure the file is a valid custom widget JSON export.
notification.previewError: Failed to fetch preview. Check the URL and try again.

attemptSearchEngineCreation.label: Create Search Engine
attemptSearchEngineCreation.description: Integration "{kind}" can be used with the search engines. Check this to automatically configure the search engine.

createApp.label: Create app
createApp.description: Create an app with the same name and icon as the integration. Leave the input field below empty to create the app with the integration URL.

unknown.title: Unknown error
unknown.description: An unknown error occurred, open the cause below to see more details

parse.title: Parse error
parse.description: The response could not be parsed. Please verify that the URL is pointing to the base URL of the service.

authorization.title: Authorization error
authorization.description: The request was not authorized. Please verify that the credentials are correct and you have them configured with enough permissions.

statusCode.title: Response error
statusCode.description: Received unexpected {statusCode} ({reason}) response from <url></url>. Please verify that the URL is pointing to the base URL of the integration.
statusCode.otherDescription: Received unexpected {statusCode} response from <url></url>. Please verify that the URL is pointing to the base URL of the integration.

description.notYetValid: The certificate is not yet valid.
description.hostnameMismatch: The certificate hostname does not match the URL.

permission.title: Not enough permissions
permission.message: You are not allowed to trust or upload certificates. Please contact your administrator to upload the necessary root certificate.

hostnameMismatch.title: Hostname mismatch
hostnameMismatch.message: The hostname in the certificate does not match the hostname you are connecting to. This could indicate a security risk, but you can still choose to trust this certificate.

extract.title: CA certificate extraction failed
extract.message: Only self signed certificates without a chain can be fetched automatically. If you are using a self signed certificate, please make sure to upload the CA certificate manually. You can find instructions on how to do this <docsLink></docsLink>.

confirm.title: Trust hostname mismatch
confirm.message: Are you sure you want to trust the certificate with a hostname mismatch?

success.title: Trusted certificate
success.message: Added hostname to trusted certificate list

error.title: Failed to trust certificate
error.message: The certificate with a hostname mismatch could not be trusted

confirm.title: Trust self signed certificate
confirm.message: Are you sure you want to trust this self signed certificate?

success.title: Trusted certificate
success.message: Added certificate to trusted certificate list

error.title: Failed to trust certificate
error.message: Failed to add certificate to trusted certificate list

details.title: Details
details.description: Review the certificate information before deciding to trust it.

connection.hostUnreachable: The server could not be reached. This usually means the host is offline or unreachable from your network.
connection.networkUnreachable: The network is unreachable. Please check your internet connection or network configuration.
connection.refused: The server refused the connection. It may not be running or is rejecting requests on the specified port.
connection.reset: The connection was unexpectedly closed by the server. This can happen if the server is unstable or restarted.

dns.notFound: The server address could not be found. Please check the URL for typos or invalid domain names.
dns.timeout: DNS lookup timed out. This may be a temporary issue—please try again in a few moments.
dns.noAnswer: The DNS server didn't return a valid response. The domain may exist but has no valid records.

timeout.aborted: The request was aborted before it could complete. This might be due to a user action or system timeout.
timeout.timeout: The request took too long to complete and was timed out. Check your network or try again later.

testConnection.alertNotice: The Save button is enabled once a successful connection is established

commonError.title: Connection failed
commonError.message: The connection could not be established

domainNotFound.title: Domain not found
domainNotFound.message: The domain could not be found

invalidJson.title: Invalid JSON
invalidJson.message: The response was not valid JSON

wrongPath.title: Wrong path
wrongPath.message: The path is probably not correct

tooManyRequests.title: Too many requests in a given time
tooManyRequests.message: There were too many requests. You are likely being rate-limited or rejected by the target system

error.internalServerError: Unable to connect to Beszel. Check your integration settings.
error.liveConnectionFailed: Live connection failed. Your Beszel instance may not support real-time streaming.
error.systemNotFound: Selected system was not found. Choose a different system.

memory.subtitle: Precise utilization at the recorded time

duplicate.title: Duplicate board
duplicate.message: This will duplicate the board {name} with all its content. If widgets reference integrations, that you are not allowed to use, they will be removed.

error.title: Unable to duplicate board
error.message: The board could not be duplicated

error.title: Unable to apply changes
error.message: The board could not be saved

confirmLeave.title: Unsaved changes
confirmLeave.message: You have unsaved changes, are you sure you want to leave?

error.title: Import failed
error.message: The board could not be imported, check the logs for further details

avoidDuplicates.label: Avoid duplicates
avoidDuplicates.description: Ignores apps where an app with the same href already exists

onlyImportApps.label: Only import apps
onlyImportApps.description: Only adds the apps, the board need to be recreated manually

screenSize.label: Screen size
screenSize.description: In versions before 1.0 three different modes existed, so you were able to choose the amount of columns for each screen size.

sidebarBehavior.label: Sidebar behavior
sidebarBehavior.description: Sidebars were removed in 1.0, you can select what should happen with the items inside them.

lastSection.label: Last section
lastSection.description: Sidebar will be displayed below the last section

removeItems.label: Remove items
removeItems.description: Items contained in the sidebar will be removed

backgroundImageUrl.label: Background image URL
backgroundImageUrl.placeholder: Start typing to search local images

fixed.label: Fixed
fixed.description: Background stays in the same position.

repeat.label: Repeat
repeat.description: The image is repeated as much as needed to cover the whole background image painting area.

no-repeat.label: No repeat
no-repeat.description: The image is not repeated and may not fill the entire space.

repeat-x.label: Repeat X
repeat-x.description: Same as 'Repeat' but only on horizontal axis.

repeat-y.label: Repeat Y
repeat-y.description: Same as 'Repeat' but only on vertical axis.

cover.label: Cover
cover.description: Scales the image as small as possible to cover the entire window by cropping excessive space.

contain.label: Contain
contain.description: Scales the image as large as possible within its container without cropping or stretching the image.

customCss.label: Custom css for this board
customCss.description: Further, customize your dashboard using CSS, only recommended for experienced users

customClassesAlert.title: Custom classes
customClassesAlert.description: You can add custom classes to your board items in the advanced options of each item and use them in the custom CSS above.

disableStatus.label: Disable app status
disableStatus.description: Disables the status check for all apps on this board

itemRadius.label: Item radius
itemRadius.description: Changes the roundness of tiles on your board

isPublic.label: Public
isPublic.description: Public boards are accessible by everyone, even without an account.

general.title: General
general.unrecognizedLink: The provided link is not recognized and won't preview, it might still work.

rename.label: Rename board
rename.description: Changing the name will break any links to this board.

public.title: Make board private
public.description: Are you sure you want to make this board private? This will hide the board from the public. Links for guest users will break.

private.title: Make board public
private.description: Are you sure you want to make this board public? This will make the board accessible to everyone.

delete.label: Delete this board
delete.description: Once you delete a board, there is no going back. Please be certain.

confirm.title: Delete board
confirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete this board? This will permanently delete the board and all its content.

noBoard.title: Welcome to Homarr
noBoard.description: A sleek,  modern dashboard that puts all of your apps and services at your fingertips.
noBoard.notice: To make this page disappear, create a board and set it as the home board

notFound.title: Board not found
notFound.description: The board specified was either not found or you don't have access to it.
notFound.notice: Check the link or contact an administrator if you think it should be accessible

admin.description: You haven't set a home board for the server yet.
admin.notice: To make this page disappear for all users, set a home board for the server

user.description: You haven't set a home board yet.
user.notice: To make this page disappear, specify the home board in your preferences

anonymous.description: The server administrator hasn't set a home board yet.
anonymous.notice: To make this page disappear, ask the server administrator to set a home board for the server

breakpoint.label: Breakpoint
breakpoint.description: Layout will be used on all screens larger than this breakpoint until the next bigger breakpoint.

error.title: This page couldn't load
error.text: An unexpected error occurred while loading this page. Your navigation is still available — try reloading, or use another section from the sidebar.

badge.label: Home
badge.tooltip: This board will show as your home board

badge.label: Mobile
badge.tooltip: This board will show as your mobile board

confirm.title: Delete board
confirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete the {name} board?

user.fieldsDisabledExternalProvider: Certain fields are disabled because they are managed by an external authentication provider.

onboardingTours.title: Onboarding Tours
onboardingTours.description: Reset the onboarding tours to see them again on your next visit to the management area or dashboard.

resetSuccess.title: Tours reset
resetSuccess.message: Onboarding tours will show again on your next visit

groups.label: Groups
groups.title: Select all groups user should be member of
groups.description: The {everyoneGroup} group is assigned to all users and can not be removed.

new.title: New invite
new.description: After the expiration, an invite will no longer be valid and the recipient of the invite won't be able to create an account.

copy.title: Copy invite
copy.description: Your invitation has been generated. After this modal closes, you'll not be able to copy this link anymore. If you do no longer wish to invite said person, you can delete this invitation any time.

delete.title: Delete invite
delete.description: Are you sure, that you want to delete this invitation? Users with this link will no longer be able to create an account using that link.

general.title: General
general.ownerOfGroupDeleted: The owner of this group was deleted. It currently has no owner.

setting.title: Settings
setting.alert: Group settings are prioritized by the order of groups in the list. The top settings overwrite the bottom settings.

error.message: Failed to save settings

general.title: Help us improve Homarr
general.text: This helps us figure out what people actually use so we know where to spend our time. We see stuff like how many widgets or integrations you have, your Homarr version, and what database you're on. That's it — no personal info, no URLs, no names, nothing that could identify you or your setup.

crawlingAndIndexing.title: Crawling and Indexing
crawlingAndIndexing.warning: Enabling or disabling any settings here will severely impact how search engines will index & crawl your page. Any setting is a request and it is up to the crawler to apply these settings. Any modification may take up to multiple days or weeks to apply. Some settings may be search engine specific.

noIndex.title: No index
noIndex.text: Do not index the website on search engines and don't show it in any search results

noFollow.title: No follow
noFollow.text: Do not follow any links while indexing. Disabling this will lead to crawlers attempting to follow all links on Homarr.

noTranslate.title: No translate
noTranslate.text: When the site language is likely not that the user is likely to want to read, Google will show a translation link in the search results

noSiteLinksSearchBox.title: No site links search box
noSiteLinksSearchBox.text: Google will build a search box with the crawled links along with other direct links. Enabling this will ask Google to disable that box.

homeBoard.label: Global home board
homeBoard.description: Only public boards are available for selection

enableStatusByDefault.label: Enable status by default
enableStatusByDefault.description: When adding an app item, the status will be enabled by default

forceDisableStatus.label: Force disable status
forceDisableStatus.description: Status for apps will be disabled for all users and can't be enabled

enableGravatar.label: Enable Gravatar
enableGravatar.description: Falls back to user avatars from Libravatar/Gravatar when no custom avatar is set and an email is configured

defaultSearchEngine.label: Global default search engine
defaultSearchEngine.description: Integration search engines can not be selected here

error.message: Failed to update interval
Failed to refresh tasks
Failed to trigger task
Failed to toggle task status

createApiToken.title: API token created
createApiToken.description: API token was created. Be careful, this token is encrypted in the database and will never be transferred again to you. If you loose this token, you'll no longer be able to retrieve this specific token.

delete.title: Delete API token
delete.text: This will permanently delete the API token. API clients using this token can no longer authenticate and perform API requests. This action cannot be undone.

mcp.label: AI / MCP
mcp.title: AI Integration
mcp.subtitle: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Server
mcp.description: Connect AI assistants to your Homarr instance and control your entire homelab through natural language. Search and request media on Overseerr, manage Docker containers, toggle Pi-hole, check server health, control Home Assistant devices, and more — all from your AI assistant.
mcp.noApiKey: You need an API key to authenticate with the MCP server.

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.intro: You can authenticate with your MCP server using either an API key or OAuth. Both methods grant the same level of access.

apiKey.title: API Key (manual)
apiKey.description: Pass the ApiKey header with your full API key in the MCP client configuration.

oauth.title: OAuth (browser login)
oauth.description: Clients that support OAuth (such as Claude Code, opencode, or Cursor) can authenticate by opening a browser window. Run the auth command in your client, log in to Homarr in the browser, and you're connected — an API key is created automatically.
oauth.hint: OAuth tokens appear as regular API keys in the Authentication tab. You can revoke them at any time.

authentication.permissions: The API key determines the permissions available to the AI — it operates with the same access level as the key owner.

streamableHttp.title: Streamable HTTP
streamableHttp.worksWith: Works with: Cursor, Claude Desktop, VS Code Copilot, Windsurf, Claude Code
streamableHttp.addToConfig: Add to your MCP client configuration file:
streamableHttp.cursor: {name}: {file} in your project or global settings
streamableHttp.replaceHint: Replace the placeholder with the API key you received when creating it.

stdio.title: stdio (legacy clients via mcp-remote bridge)
stdio.description: For clients that only support stdio transport. Requires {dependency} (Node.js) installed locally:

testConnection.title: Test Your Connection
testConnection.description: Run this in your terminal to verify the endpoint is reachable and your API key works:
testConnection.hint: A successful response returns the MCP server capabilities. If you see an error, check the JSON response for hints.

availableTools.title: Available Tools
availableTools.description: {count} tools available. Expand a category to see individual tools and their descriptions.

missingHeader.title: "Missing ApiKey header"
missingHeader.description: Your client is not sending the {header} header. Verify the {section} section in your MCP config is correct. Some clients require restarting after config changes.

invalidFormat.title: "Invalid ApiKey format"
invalidFormat.description: Make sure you copied the full API key, not just part of it.

invalidKey.title: "Invalid API key"
invalidKey.description: The key ID was not found or the token is wrong. API keys can only be viewed once when created. If you lost it, delete the old key and create a new one.

connectionRefused.title: Connection refused / timeout
connectionRefused.description: Make sure the URL is reachable from your AI client. If Homarr runs behind a reverse proxy or in Docker, use the external URL (not {localhost}). Verify the port is correct (default: 7575 for Docker).

toolsNotAppearing.title: Tools not appearing
toolsNotAppearing.description: Some tools require specific integrations to be configured (e.g. Docker, Overseerr). The tool list depends on what's available in your Homarr instance.

oneClick.title: Install in One Click
oneClick.subtitle: Uses OAuth — authenticate in your browser on first use
oneClick.copyHint: For ChatGPT, Claude Code, or any MCP client

export.title: Export Database
export.description: Download a full backup of your SQLite database including all settings, users, boards, and encrypted integration secrets. The backup is bundled as a ZIP file with the encryption key and metadata.

confirm.title: Sensitive data export
confirm.warningTitle: This export contains your entire database.
confirm.warningBody: The backup includes all users, integration secrets (encrypted), API keys, board configurations, and app data. Store the exported file securely and do not share it.

import.title: Restore Database
import.description: Upload a previously exported backup ZIP to restore your database. This will replace your entire database. If the backup was created with a different encryption key, secrets will be automatically re-encrypted.
import.warning: Restoring a backup will completely replace your current database and restart the application. This action cannot be undone.

dropzone.title: Drop your backup ZIP here or click to browse
dropzone.description: Only .zip files from a Homarr SQLite backup are accepted

success.title: Restore Complete
success.message: Database has been restored successfully. The application is restarting...

dropzone.title: Drop your backup ZIP here
dropzone.description: Accepts .zip files from a Homarr SQLite backup (max 256 MB)

preview.title: Backup Contents
preview.migrationsOlderVersion: This backup was from an older Homarr version. {count} schema migration was applied to bring it up to date.
preview.migrationsOlderVersionPlural: This backup was from an older Homarr version. {count} schema migrations were applied to bring it up to date.
preview.migrationsUpToDate: Database schema is up to date ({count} migrations applied)

confirm.title: Destructive action
confirm.warningTitle: This will permanently replace your entire database.
confirm.warningBody: All current boards, users, apps, integrations, settings, and sessions will be lost. This action cannot be undone. The application will restart after the restore.

complete.title: Restore Complete
complete.message: Database has been restored successfully. The server is restarting — please refresh the page in a few seconds.

about.text: Homarr is a community driven open source project that is being maintained by volunteers. Thanks to these people, Homarr has been a growing project since 2021. Our team is working completely remote from many different countries on Homarr in their leisure time for no compensation.

welcome.title: Welcome to Homarr!
welcome.description: This is your control center. From here you manage boards, apps, integrations, users, and server settings. Let's take a tour of each section.

boardsList.title: Your Boards
boardsList.description: Here are all your dashboards. Each board has its own layout, background, and access settings. You can see who created each one and whether it's public or private.

boardsCreate.title: Create a Board
boardsCreate.description: Click here to create a new dashboard or import one from a previous Homarr installation. Each board gets its own URL you can share.

appsList.title: Your Apps
appsList.description: These are all the apps you've added — links to your self-hosted services. Each app has an icon, optional health check, and a status badge on the dashboard.

appsCreate.title: Add an App
appsCreate.description: Register a new service here. Give it a name, URL, and icon — it will appear as a tile on your boards with live status monitoring.

integrationsList.title: Your Integrations
integrationsList.description: These are the services connected to Homarr — Sonarr, Radarr, Plex, Jellyfin, and 50+ more. All credentials are encrypted at rest.

integrationsCreate.title: Add an Integration
integrationsCreate.description: Connect a new service here. Pick the type, enter the URL and API key — Homarr validates the connection before saving.

usersList.title: Your Users
usersList.description: See everyone who has access. Organize users into groups and control who can view or edit each board.

usersCreate.title: Create a User
usersCreate.description: Add a new user account here. You can also use invite links for easy onboarding. That's the tour — you're all set!

welcome.title: This is your board
welcome.description: A drag-and-drop dashboard where you arrange apps and widgets. Press Ctrl+K anytime to search for apps, boards, and actions.

editMode.title: Edit Mode
editMode.description: Click here to enter edit mode. You can then add widgets, apps, and sections — drag to reposition, resize with the corner handle. Click again to save your changes.

settings.title: Board Settings
settings.description: Change this board's name, columns, background, colors, and who can access it. Each board can be public or private.

switcher.title: Switch Boards
switcher.description: Jump between boards. Create separate dashboards for different purposes — media, networking, per-user, or anything you like.

userMenu.title: Your Profile
userMenu.description: Change your color scheme, language, home board, and preferences. You can also jump to the management area from here.
